mapper.sql: id, group_id, scene_number, description, prompt, character_ids, frame_image_url, frame_status, is_confirmed, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO storyboard ( group_id, scene_number, description, prompt, character_ids, frame_image_url, frame_status, is_confirmed, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{storyboard.groupId}, #{storyboard.sceneNumber}, #{storyboard.description}, #{storyboard.prompt}, #{storyboard.characterIds}, #{storyboard.frameImageUrl}, #{storyboard.frameStatus}, #{storyboard.isConfirmed}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM storyboard WHERE group_id = #{groupId} ORDER BY scene_number ASC
